item.label: Expose bulk operations in MCP and tm_helper
item.summary: Add tm_bulk_state and multi-item tm_batch_update to MCP tools and tm_helper functions

body:
# Description

Cancelled with `spec-008` after the owning request record was removed. Recreate this task under a new request if helper and MCP exposure for bulk operations is resumed.

Cancelled with parent specification.

# Notes
